title: F5 Split
description: Bind separate keys for front and back third-person views. Toggle, hold, custom FOV, and smart return behavior.
body:
## Description F5 Split adds dedicated keybinds for front and back third-person views, allowing you to bypass the standard cycle and gain instant access to the perspective you need. ### Features * **Separate Keybinds** – Bind different keys for Front View (facing your character) and Back View (classic third-person). * **Toggle & Hold Modes** – Press once to switch permanently, or hold the key to peek and release to return to your previous view. * **Independent FOV** – Customize a specific Field of View for each perspective to suit your cinematic or gameplay needs. * **Smart Return Behavior** – Configure whether the camera reverts to first-person or your last active view upon releasing or toggling. ## Compatibility
Category Support
MC Versions 1.21.x, 26.1.x
Maintenance Latest version only (26.1.x)
Loaders Fabric (Official), Quilt (Compatible)
## Dependencies
